Name: Stardew HDT Physics
Author: JosephsDeadish
Description: Zero-requirement plug-and-play physics mod: body jiggle, HDT hair (wind/rain/snow), idle motion, ragdoll, per-archetype monster physics (slime/bat/worm/bug/furry/skeleton), farm animal physics, NPC/pet sword knockdown, environmental grass+item collision physics. Works with LewdEW, Valley Girls, XTardew, HornyFur, Anthro, Fashion Sense, Creatures and Cuties, Pokémon mods, and all custom sprite/hair/creature/animal mods.
